decks.notes: This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo utilizing cards like Basking Broodscale, Glaring Fleshraker, Malevolent Rumble, and Blade of the Bloodchief to create a resilient and aggressive threat on the board. By utilizing powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and manipulating the board with cards like Urza's Saga, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently. With a mix of ramp, removal, and card draw, this deck seeks to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory in a fast-paced Modern 1 vs 1 environment.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage to outvalue the opponent. It also includes a companion to provide additional benefits. The deck's win condition is to stabilize the board with board wipes like Supreme Verdict and Solitude, while generating card advantage with cards like Consult the Star Charts and Meticulous Archive. Teferi, Time Raveler and Teferi, Hero of Dominaria provide additional control elements and card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and outlast the opponent with powerful spells and card advantage.

The deck focuses on assembling a toolbox of creatures that can be searched for and put into play using cards like Chord of Calling and Yawgmoth, Thran Physician. The key strategy is to generate value through sacrificing and recurring creatures, with specific creatures like Marionette Apprentice and Blood Artist providing additional win conditions. The deck also has mana acceleration with cards like Wall of Roots and Birthing Ritual, allowing for explosive turns and combo potential. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and overwhelm the opponent with a diverse array of synergistic creatures and combo interactions.

The focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent by playing low-cost aggressive creatures and burn spells. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent and end the game before they have a chance to stabilize or gain control. Utilizing fast land drops and efficient spells, the deck aims to maintain pressure and reduce the opponent's life total to zero as quickly as possible. The deck is designed to be proactive, with little to no reactive elements, in order to maximize aggression and capitalize on the opponent's vulnerabilities.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo utilizing cards like Glaring Fleshraker, Blade of the Bloodchief, and Basking Broodscale to generate a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent. It also includes utility cards like Mishra's Bauble, Ancient Stirrings, and Urza's Saga to search for key pieces of the combo and maintain card advantage. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble while utilizing Emrakul, the Promised End as a finisher. Finally, cards like Traverse the Ulvenwald and Springleaf Drum help to ramp and fix mana for the combo pieces to come together.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana to consistently cast powerful cascade spells like Crashing Footfalls and Violent Outburst, which can overwhelm opponents with a flurry of creatures and spells. The deck also utilizes cards like Subtlety and Dead / Gone to control the board, while Quantum Riddler and Vibrance provide additional card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Endurance and Boseiju, Who Endures helps the deck handle graveyard-focused strategies and counter control decks effectively. Overall, the deck aims to pressure opponents with an aggressive game plan backed up by powerful cascade effects.

This deck focuses on assembling a fast and powerful combo using non-land cards to quickly win the game. By utilizing cards like Lotus Bloom and Whir of Invention, as well as countermagic like Counterspell and Force of Negation, the deck aims to disrupt opponents while setting up its win condition with cards like Goblin Charbelcher and Hydroelectric Specimen. The deck also includes card draw and control elements to ensure consistency and protection while executing its combo. Ultimately, the goal is to overwhelm opponents with a deadly combo without relying on traditional land-based strategies.

This deck aims to quickly apply pressure on the opponent by utilizing cheap and efficient creatures that can deal damage quickly. By playing cards like Slickshot Show-Off, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Monastery Swiftspear alongside spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, the deck can quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero. The deck also includes card draw and manipulation like Preordain and Expressive Iteration to ensure a consistent stream of threats and answers. The mana base is optimized for aggressive plays with a mix of fetch lands and utility lands.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful control spells and card advantage engines to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents. It combines counter magic, board wipes, and card draw to control the game tempo and protect its key threats. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion adds flexibility and synergy to the deck. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating incremental advantage through card draw and efficient removal spells, ultimately leading to victory through attrition and resource management.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and planeswalkers like Teferi. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and eventually win through card advantage and powerful threats like Hall of Storm Giants. The addition of Kaheera as a companion provides additional utility and synergizes well with the deck's focus on control. By efficiently managing resources and answering threats, this UW Control deck aims to outlast its opponents and secure victory through superior card advantage and strategic play.

The main concept of this deck is to use the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant, Urza's Tower) to quickly ramp up to powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Devourer of Destiny. The deck also utilizes cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Spirit Dragon for control and removal. Glaring Fleshraker and Sire of Seven Deaths provide additional threats and disruption. The deck focuses on mana efficiency and using powerful creatures and spells to dominate the board and outvalue the opponent.

This deck focuses on efficiently deploying artifact creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive threats while also disrupting their game plan with artifact hate and counterspells. The key strength lies in using cards like Engineered Explosives, Arcbound Ravager, and Urza's Saga to generate value and pressure the opponent, backed up by cards like Metallic Rebuke and Tormod's Crypt to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategies. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mishra's Bauble provide card advantage and graveyard interaction, enhancing the deck's overall strategy.

The deck aims to establish control over the game by utilizing the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant, Urza's Tower) to generate a large amount of mana quickly. It then uses powerful colorless Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Karn, the Great Creator acts as a versatile threat and tool box, enabling the deck to access artifacts like Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere to further control the game. Overall, the deck looks to lockdown the opponent while deploying massive threats to close out the game.

This deck focuses on quickly generating a large amount of mana with cards like Desperate Ritual and Pyretic Ritual, as well as reducing the cost of your spells with Ruby Medallion. It aims to chain together spells using Past in Flames and Ral, Monsoon Mage to eventually win the game with a massive Grapeshot or an overwhelming board presence. The deck also includes cards like Reckless Impulse and Glimpse the Impossible to help find key combo pieces and maintain card advantage. The goal is to overwhelm your opponent with a powerful combo finish.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and creatures to quickly overwhelm and outpace the opponent, utilizing synergy between artifacts like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to generate mana and card advantage. It also includes cards like Galvanic Blast and Engineered Explosives for removal and disruption. The goal is to establish a strong board presence early in the game and quickly close out the match before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The deck also includes cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga for additional value and resilience.

The main concept of this Modern Control - UrzaTron deck is to utilize the Urza lands (Power Plant, Mine, Tower) to ramp up mana and cast powerful threats such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, and Ugin, the Spirit Dragon. The deck focuses on controlling the game with counterspells like Force of Negation and removal spells like Dismember while generating card advantage with Stock Up and Ugin's Labyrinth. The deck also includes Devourer of Destiny and Portent of Calamity for additional threats and disruption. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats and powerful control spells.
